AutoOpen.Name: Open Selection Automatically
AutoOpen.Hint: Show the hero selection screen to players who connect without an assigned character.

SheetAccess.Name: Allow Viewing Character Sheets
SheetAccess.Hint: When enabled, players can open a hero's character sheet from the selection screen. Observer access is automatically granted to all players on available roster actors and revoked when a hero is claimed.

Menu.Name: Hero Roster
Menu.Label: Configure Roster
Menu.Hint: Drag and drop Actors to build the roster of heroes players can claim.

SoundMenu.Name: Selection Sounds
SoundMenu.Label: Configure Sounds
SoundMenu.Hint: Customize the sounds played on the hero selection screen and their volume.

VisualMenu.Name: Selection Background
VisualMenu.Label: Configure Background
VisualMenu.Hint: Set an image or video background for the hero selection screen.

img.label: Card Image
img.hint: Optional image shown on the hero grid card (always square). Falls back to the Actor portrait.

detailImg.label: Detail Image
detailImg.hint: Optional image shown in the side panel when a player selects this hero. Falls back to the card image.

description.label: Description
description.hint: Rich-text presentation shown to players when they inspect this hero.

RosterConfig.Title: Claim Your Hero — Roster
RosterConfig.DropHint: Drag Actors or an Actor Folder here (sidebar or Compendium) to add them to the roster
RosterConfig.NoHeroes: No heroes yet. Drag an Actor above to begin.
RosterConfig.DragHint: Drag onto a player to assign this hero
RosterConfig.DropSlot: Drag a hero here to assign it
RosterConfig.Unassign: Unassign this hero (returns it to the available list)
RosterConfig.OpenFor: Open selection screen for this player
RosterConfig.Duplicate: This Actor is already in the roster.
RosterConfig.FolderNoneAdded: No new Actors were found in this folder.
RosterConfig.RemoveConfirm: Remove {name} from the roster? The Actor itself is not deleted.
RosterConfig.ReleaseConfirm: Release {name} from {user}? Ownership and character assignment will be removed.
RosterConfig.AssignReplace: Their current character ({current}) will be unlinked and its ownership revoked.
RosterConfig.AssignTaken: This hero is already claimed by another player. Unassign it first.
RosterConfig.AssignFailed: The assignment could not be completed. Check the console for details.

hover.label: Hover Sound
hover.hint: Played when the cursor moves over a hero card.

select.label: Selection Sound
select.hint: Played when a hero is selected.

confirm.label: Confirmation Sound
confirm.hint: Played when a player confirms their claim.

volume.label: Volume
volume.hint: Single volume applied to all module sounds.

type.label: Background Type
type.hint: Choose the type of background displayed on the hero selection screen.

imageSrc.label: Image File
imageSrc.hint: Image displayed as the full-screen background.

videoSrc.label: Video File
videoSrc.hint: Video played as the full-screen background (always muted, loops continuously).

overlayOpacity.label: Content Overlay Opacity
overlayOpacity.hint: Darkness of the veil drawn over the background to keep text and cards readable. 0 = fully transparent, 1 = fully opaque.

Selection.Title: Claim Your Hero
Selection.Subtitle: Choose the hero you wish to play. Others can contest your pick until you confirm.
Selection.NoHeroes: The Game Master has not prepared any heroes yet.
Selection.NoGM: A Game Master must be connected to confirm your claim.
Selection.SheetNoPermission: You do not have permission to view this character sheet.

Error.missing: This hero is no longer available in the roster.
Error.taken: Another player has already claimed this hero.
Error.alreadyHas: You already have a character assigned.
Error.failed: The claim could not be completed. Please try again.
